title: Peterborough Cathedral, Graffiti Removal
caption: We carried out laser cleaning work at Peterborough Cathedral, by removing graffiti from the historic stonework at no cost to the Cathedral. Peterborough Cathedral is part of the fabric of Peterborough, and we wanted to help by using our specialist laser cleaning technology, which is a precise, non-abrasive, and environmentally friendly method that's especially suited to delicate and historic surfaces. It was a privilege to be able to offer our time to help preserve such an important part of Peterborough's heritage.
beforeCaption: Graffiti tags scratched into the historic stonework, Peterborough Cathedral.
afterCaption: Stonework fully restored after laser cleaning.
